projectDescription: A community-maintained binary build repository that compiles and distributes signed, login-free builds of the open-source Lens Kubernetes IDE across macOS, Linux, and Windows.
keyFeatures: Pre-built signed binaries for macOS, Linux, and Windows
No login required — open-source only build
Automated version tracking from upstream lensapp/lens
Support for community extensions (e.g., node pod menu)
Multiple install methods: Homebrew, Scoop, Winget, Chocolatey, direct download
publicApiSurface: Latest tag — always points to most recent signed build
SHA256 checksums for all release assets
update.js — patches upstream package.json for build customization
GitHub Actions: main.yml (build + release), check.yml (version polling), clear.yml (cleanup)
